oathauth-desc: Waxay bixisaa taageero aqoonsi oo ku salaysan HMAC erayo sir ah oo hal-mar ah iyo hab-maamuuska WebAuthn
recover2faforuser: Dib u soo celi xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ee isticmaalaha
oathauth-secret: Furaha sirta ah ee xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo:
oathauth-recoverycodes: Isticmaal tan haddii aad lumiso gelitaanka hababkaaga xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
oathauth-recoverycodes-important: Tallaabadani waa muhiim! Ha ka boodin tallaabadan!
oathauth-recoverycodes-neveragain: Koodhadhkan mar dambe lama muujin doono!
oathauth-recoverytokens-createdat: Koodhadhka soo kabashada waa la sameeyay: $1
oathauth-recoverycodes-copy-success: Koodhadhka soo kabashada waxaa lagu koobiyeeyay sabuuraddaada!
oathauth-recoverycodes-create-label: Abuur {{PLURAL:$1|koodh cusub oo soo kabasho|koodhadh cusub oo soo kabasho}}
oathauth-recoverycodes-too-many-instance: In ka badan hal koodh oo soo kabasho ayaa laga helay keydka xogta ee isticmaalahan.
oathauth-recoverycodes-exist: Waxaad hore u haysatay koodhadh soo kabasho. Halkan waa mar kale si aad u nuquliso ama u soo dejiso meel ammaan ah.
oathauth-recoverycodes-header-create: Abuur koodhadh cusub oo soo kabasho
oathauth-recoverycodes-regenerate-warnin: Haddii aad abuurto {{PLURAL:$1|koodh cusub oo soo kabasho|koodhadh cusub oo soo kabasho}}, koodhadhkaagii asalka ahaa ee soo kabashada {{PLURAL:$1|koodh|koodhadh}} mar dambe ma shaqayn doonaan.
oathauth-recoverycodes-temporary-desc: {{PLURAL:$1|koodh dheeraad ah|koodhadh dheeraad ah oo gaaraya $1}}, kuwaas oo dhacaya $2.
oathauth-recoverycodes-temporary-intro: {{PLURAL:$1|Koodhkan waa|Koodhadhkan waa}} la soo saaray oo laguugu soo diray iimayl markii aad codsatay caawimo si aad dib ugu soo ceshato gelitaanka xisaabtaada. {{PLURAL:$1|Wuxuu|Waxay}} shaqeynayaa muddo kooban waxaana gacanta looga saari karaa hore.
oathauth-recoverycodes-temporary-remove-: Ka saar koodhka soo kabashada ku-meelgaarka ah {{PLURAL:$1|koodh|koodhadh}}

Waxaad ku dhowdahay inaad ka saarto koodhka soo kabashada ku-meelgaarka ah {{PLURAL:$1|koodh|koodhadh}}, kaas oo aad heshay qayb ka mid ah habka soo kabashada xisaabta. Hubi inaad haysato habab kale oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah, si aad weli ugu soo geli karto xisaabtaada.
Koodhka soo kabashada ku-meelgaarka ah {{PLURAL:$1|waa la saaray|waa laga saaray}}. Koodhadhka kale ee soo kabashada {{PLURAL:$2|wuu sii jiraa|way sii jiraan}}.
oathauth-failedtovalidateoath: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la isku dayayay in la xaqiijiyo koodhka ka yimid barnaamijkaaga xaqiijinta. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
oathauth-validatedoath: Xogta xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo waa la xaqiijiyay. Xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo hadda waa la dhaqan gelin doonaa.
oathauth-noscratchforvalidation: Ma isticmaali kartid koodh soo kabasho si aad u xaqiijiso xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo. Koodhadhka soo kabashada waxaa loo isticmaalaa kaliya kayd iyo xaalado gaar ah. Fadlan isticmaal koodh ka yimid barnaamijkaaga xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo (sida [https://www.authy.com/ Authy], [https://freeotp.github.io/ FreeOTP], [https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/1066447 Google Authenticator], [https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/mobile-authenticator-app Microsoft Authenticator] ama [https://1password.com/ 1Password]).
oathauth-recoveredoath: Koodhadh cusub oo soo kabasho {{PLURAL:$1|koodh|koodhadh}} oo loogu talagalay $3 {{PLURAL:$1|la sameeyay|waa la sameeyay}} waxaana iimayl ahaan loogu diray {{GENDER:$2|isaga|iyada|iyaga}}.
oathauth-step1: Tallaabada 1: Soo dejiso barnaamij xaqiijin laba-tallaabo
oathauth-step1-test: Soo dejiso barnaamij xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo. Waxay noqon kartaa barnaamij mobile ama desktop ah, sida [https://www.authy.com/ Authy], [https://freeotp.github.io/ FreeOTP], [https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/1066447 Google Authenticator], [https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/mobile-authenticator-app Microsoft Authenticator] ama [https://1password.com/ 1Password].
oathauth-step-friendly-name-text: Haddii aad ku darto in ka badan hal barnaamij, waxaad ogaan doontaa mid kasta midka uu yahay.
oathauth-step2-qrcode: Ku sawir QR code-ka adigoo isticmaalaya barnaamijka aad soo dejisay tallaabada 1 si aad u shiddo xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
oathauth-step2alt: Haddii aadan awoodin inaad sawirto QR code-ka, gacanta ku geli furaha sirta ah iyo magaca xisaabta:
oathauth-entertoken: Geli koodh ka yimid qalabkaaga xaqiijinta si loo xaqiijiyo:
oathauth-enter-recovery-code: Geli koodhkaaga soo kabashada ee horay loo soo saaray
oathauth-recover-for-user: Soo celi xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ee isticmaale
oathauth-verify-for-user: Hubi in isticmaale uu leeyahay xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa
right-oathauth-recover-for-user: Soo celi xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ee isticmaale
action-oathauth-recover-for-user: Soo celi xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ee isticmaale
right-oathauth-verify-user: Hubi in isticmaale uu leeyahay xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa
action-oathauth-verify-user: Hubi in isticmaale uu leeyahay xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa
oathauth-disable-intro: Awood weyn, waxaa la socota masuuliyad weyn
oathauth-recover-intro:
Marka la gudbiyo foomkan, waxaa loo abuuri doonaa isticmaaleha koodh soo kabasho cusub {{PLURAL:$1|koodh soo kabasho|dejisan $2 koodh oo soo kabasho}}. Isticmaaleha wuxuu u baahan doonaa {{PLURAL:$1|koodhkan|mid ka mid ah koodhadhkan}} si uu dib ugu helo gelitaanka xisaabtiisa.

Koodhadhka soo kabashada ee hore ayaa weli shaqaynaya ilaa isticmaalehu dib u soo saaro koodhadh cusub.
oathauth-recover-for-user-legend: Abuur koodhadh dheeraad ah oo soo kabasho {{PLURAL:$1|koodh|koodhadh}} oo loogu talagalay isticmaale
oathauth-enterrecoveremail: Ciwaanka iimaylka ee lagu dirayo koodhka soo kabashada {{PLURAL:$1|koodh|koodhadh}}:
oathauth-enterrecoveremail-help: Qiimaha goobtan waxaa la isticmaali doonaa oo kaliya haddii isticmaalehu uusan lahayn ciwaan iimayl oo ku xiran xisaabtiisa. Haddii kale waa la iska indhatiri doonaa.
oathauth-user-not-does-not-have-oath-ena: Isticmaalehu ma haysto xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa, sidaas darteed wax la damiyo ma jiraan.
oathauth-recover-fail-no-2fa: Isticmaalehu ma haysto xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa, sidaas darteed soo kabasho lama adeegsan karo.
oathauth-recover-fail-email-required: Isticmaalehu ma haysto ciwaan iimayl oo la xaqiijiyay oo ku xiran xisaabtiisa. Fadlan bixi ciwaan iimayl si fariinta loogu diro.
oathauth-recover-fail-max-codes-reached: Isticmaalehu wuxuu hore u gaaray tirada ugu badan ee koodhadhka soo kabashada. Lama abuuri karo koodhadh dheeraad ah oo soo kabasho.
oathauth-recover-email-title: Koodhadh dheeraad ah oo soo kabasho {{PLURAL:$1|koodh|koodhadh}} oo loogu talagalay xisaabtaada
oathauth-recover-email-text:
{{GENDER:$1|Qofka la jecel}} $1,

Koodhadh dheeraad ah oo soo kabasho {{PLURAL:$2|koodh|koodhadh}} oo loogu talagalay xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ayaa lagu sameeyay $5. Waxaad isticmaali kartaa {{PLURAL:$2|koodhkan|koodhadhkan}} si aad u gasho xisaabtaada haddii aad lumiso gelitaanka hababka kale ee xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.

$3

{{PLURAL:$2|Koodhkan|Koodhadhkan}} waxa la isticmaali karaa oo keliya ilaa $8. Fadlan samee hab cusub oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah ka hor waqtigaas, si aad u sii haysato gelitaanka xisaabtaada. Ilaa iyo inta {{PLURAL:$2|uu shaqaynayo|ay shaqaynayaan}}, fadlan ku hay {{PLURAL:$2|koodhkan|koodhadhkan}} meel ammaan ah.

Haddii {{GENDER:$1|aad}} aadan bilaabin tallaabadan, qof ayaa laga yaabaa inuu iska dhigay {{GENDER:$1|adiga}} si uu u helo gelitaanka xisaabtaada. $4
oathauth-recover-email-text-please-conta: Haddii tani ay dhacday, fadlan {{GENDER:$1|la xiriir}} maamulaha goobta.
Haddii tani ay dhacday, fadlan {{GENDER:$1|la xiriir}} maamulaha goobta ($2).
oathauth-auth-token-help: Eray sir ah oo hal mar la isticmaalo oo loo adeegsado sidii qodobka labaad ee xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
oathauth-auth-token-help-ui: Geli koodhka 6-god ah ee ka yimid barnaamijkaaga xaqiijiye.
oathauth-auth-recovery-code-help: Geli mid ka mid ah koodhadhkaaga soo kabashada.
oathauth-auth-ui: Fadlan geli koodh ka yimid barnaamijkaaga xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo (sida [https://www.authy.com/ Authy], [https://freeotp.github.io/ FreeOTP], [https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/1066447 Google Authenticator], [https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/mobile-authenticator-app Microsoft Authenticator] ama [https://1password.com/ 1Password]).
oathauth-auth-switch-module-help: U deji newModule magaca module-ka cusub si aad u hesho caqabad cusub oo ka timaadda module kale oo 2FA ah. Ka tag madhan haddii aad ka jawaabayso caqabadda hadda jirta.
oathauth-throttled: Isku dayo badan ayaa la sameeyay! Fadlan sug dhowr daqiiqo.
oathauth-recovery-code-login-failed: Xaqiijinta koodhka soo kabashada waa fashilantay.
grant-group-authentication: Samee falalka xaqiijinta naftaada iyo kuwa kale
grant-oath: Hel xogta xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo (OATH) ee naftaada iyo kuwa kale
oathauth-user-not-found: Lama helin xisaab isticmaale oo leh magacaas
oath-log-header: Dhacdooyinkan waxay la socdaan isbeddellada xaaladda xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ee isticmaalayaasha.
logentry-oath-recover: $1 {{GENDER:$2|wuu sameeyay}} koodhadh dheeraad ah oo soo kabasho {{PLURAL:$4|koodh|koodhadh}} ah oo loogu talagalay $3
logentry-oath-verify: $1 {{GENDER:$2|wuu hubiyay}} in $3 uu leeyahay xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa
logentry-oath-verify-failed: Isku day fashilmay oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah
logentry-oath-verify-success: Isku day guuleystay oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah
log-action-filter-oath-verify: Hubinaya in xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ay shaqaynayso
log-action-filter-oath-disable-other: Daminaya xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ee isticmaale kale
log-action-filter-oath-recover: Abuuraya koodhadh cusub oo soo kabasho oo loogu talagalay isticmaale kale
oathauth-verify-automatic-comment: Si otomaatig ah ayaa loo xaqiijinayaa si loo hubiyo u-qalmitaanka kooxaha isticmaalaha
oathauth-recoverycodes-description: Koodh gaar ah ama koodhadh gaar ah oo aad u isticmaali karto sidii qodob labaad oo xaqiijin ah, ama si aad dib ugu soo ceshato xisaabtaada haddii hab hore uu naafo noqdo. Koodhadhka soo kabashada si toos ah ayaa loo sameeyaa marka aad shiddo hab kale oo xaqiijin ah (sida barnaamij xaqiijiye). Waxaad dib u soo saari kartaa, koobiyeeyn kartaa, ama soo dejisan kartaa koodhadhka soo kabashada wakhti kasta, ilaa iyo inta hab kale oo xaqiijin ah uu shaqaynayo.
oathauth-invalid-data-format: Bixiyaha xogta ma ansaxayo si loo abuuro furaha habka xaqiijinta ee la doortay
oathauth-invalid-recovery-code-data-form: Koodhka soo kabashada lama abuuri karin.
oathauth-action-exclusive-to-2fa: Tallaabadan waxaa kaliya fulin kara isticmaalayaal leh xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa.
oathauth-totp-description: Habka Time-based One-Time Password (TOTP) waa kordhin ka mid ah habka HMAC-based One-Time Password (HOTP), kaas oo soo saara eray-sir hal mar la isticmaalo adigoo ka dhigaya mid gaar ah waqtiga hadda.
oathauth-disable-method-warning: Haddii aad damiso $1 habka xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo, mar dambe ma awoodi doontid inaad isticmaasho habkan marka aad gelayso, dhammaan xogta la xiriirta habkan xaqiijintana waa la tirtiri doonaa. Haddii aad leedahay hab kale oo xaqiijin ah oo shaqaynaya, koodhadhkaaga soo kabashada lama tirtiri doono.
oathauth-totp-disable-warning: Mar dambe ma awoodi doontid inaad isticmaasho qalabka xaqiijinta ee ku diiwaangashan xisaabtan. Dhammaan koodhadhka soo kabashada ee la xiriira xisaabtan waa la joojin doonaa, ilaa aad haysato hab kale oo xaqiijin ah oo shaqaynaya.
notification-header-oathauth-remove-devi: Qalab xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah ayaa laga saaray {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}}.
notification-body-oathauth-disable: Haddii {{GENDER:$2|aad}} aadan tan samayn, {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}} waxaa laga yaabaa in la jabsaday.
notification-body-oathauth-disable-other: Haddii {{GENDER:$2|aad}} aadan codsan tan, {{GENDER:$2|waa inaad}} la xiriirtaa maamule.
notification-body-oathauth-disable-remai: Weli {{PLURAL:$3|wuu jiraa qalab dheeraad ah|waxaa jira $3 qalab oo dheeraad ah}} oo ku xiran {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}}.
notification-body-oathauth-enable: Haddii {{GENDER:$2|aad}} aadan tan samayn, {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}} waxaa laga yaabaa in la jabsaday.
notification-header-oathauth-recoverycod: {{GENDER:$2|Adigu}} waa inaad dib ugu diiwaangelisaa {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}} xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
notification-body-oathauth-recoverycodes: {{GENDER:$2|Adigu}} waxaad haysataa $3 koodh {{PLURAL:$3|soo kabasho|soo kabashada}} ah oo haray. Waxaa laga yaabaa inaad rabto inaad dib u soo saarto $4 koodh {{PLURAL:$4|cusub oo soo kabasho|cusub oo soo kabashada}} ah si aad mustaqbalka u isticmaasho.
notification-header-oathauth-recoverycod: Koodh dheeraad ah oo soo kabasho {{PLURAL:$3|waa la sameeyay}} ayaa loo sameeyay {{GENDER:|adiga}}
notification-body-oathauth-recoverycodes: Haddii {{GENDER:|aad}} aadan bilaabin tallaabadan, qof ayaa laga yaabaa inuu iska dhigay {{GENDER:|adiga}} si uu u helo gelitaanka xisaabtaada.
notification-body-oathauth-twofactor-req:
Xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ayaa laga rabayaa {{GENDER:$2|adiga}} si aad u gasho wiki-kan, laga bilaabo $3.

Isbeddelkan wuxuu si fiican u ilaalin doonaa xogta iyo xisaabaadka ku jira wiki-kan.
notification-header-oathauth-twofactor-r: Xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ayaa laga rabayaa {{GENDER:$2|adiga}} si aad u gasho wiki-kan, laga bilaabo $3
oathauth-verify-enabled: {{GENDER:$1|$1}} waxa uu leeyahay xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa.
oathauth-verify-disabled: {{GENDER:$1|$1}} ma haysto xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa.
oathauth-qrcode-alt: QR code la iska akhriyi karo oo matalaya furaha sirta ah.
oathauth-hint: Ma haysatid gelitaan qalabkaaga ama barnaamijka xaqiijinta? Waxaad geli kartaa koodh soo kabasho (oo lagu siiyay markii aad shidday xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo) goobtan.
oathauth-recovery-code-hint: Miyaad lumisay koodhkaaga soo kabashada? Fadlan la xiriir [[{{MediaWiki:Grouppage-sysop}}|maamule]].
oathauth-must-be-central: {{GENDER:$1|Xisaabtaada}} waa in lagu xiraa nidaamka dhexe ee xaqiijinta si aad u isticmaasho xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
oathauth-error-multiple-modules: Waqtigan xaadirka ah, lama taageero isticmaalka habab badan oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah. Waxaad kaliya awood u yeelan kartaa $1 ka dib marka aad damiso $2.
oathauth-password-label: Deji eray-sir adag si aad u ilaaliso xisaabtaada.
oathauth-authenticator-placeholder: Ku dar tallaabo dheeraad ah marka aad gelayso si loo xoojiyo amniga xisaabtaada.
oathauth-delete-warning: Mar dambe ma awoodi doontid inaad isticmaasho habkan xaqiijinta si aad u gasho.
oathauth-delete-confirm-box: Geli "{{int:oathauth-authenticator-delete-text}}" si aad u sii wadato
oathauth-delete-warning-final: Ka saarista habkan waxay gabi ahaanba damin doontaa xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo. Tani sidoo kale waxay tirtiri doontaa koodhadhka soo kabashada iyo furayaasha gelitaanka. Tani waxay ka dhigi doontaa xisaabtaada mid amni ahaan liidata.
oathauth-delete-wrong-confirm-message: Gelin khaldan oo loogu talagalay ka saarista furaha ugu dambeeya. Fadlan ku qor "{{int:oathauth-authenticator-delete-text}}" si aad u sii wadato
oathauth-max-keys-exceeded: Xadka hababka xaqiijinta waa la gaaray
oathauth-max-keys-exceeded-message: Waxaad gaartay tirada ugu badan ee hababka xaqiijinta, taas oo ah $1. Fadlan ka saar hal hab oo xaqiijin ah ka hor intaadan ku darin mid cusub.
oathauth-passkeys-placeholder: Furayaasha gelitaanka ayaa ka ammaan badan eray-siraha, waxayna kuu oggolaanayaan inaad ku gasho si la mid ah sida aad u furto qalabkaaga.
oathauth-passkeys-no2fa: Si aad ugu darto furaha gelitaanka, waa inaad marka hore dejisaa xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
oathauth-passkey-dialog-text:
Furayaasha gelitaanka waa habka ugu ammaan badan ee aad ugu gali karto xisaabtaada. Dadka badankoodna waa habka ugu fudud.

Iyada oo furaha gelitaanka, waxaad ugu gali kartaa {{SITENAME}} si la mid ah sida aad u furto qalabkaaga, ha ahaato PIN, faro-qaadasho, ama aqoonsiga wejiga.

Si kasta oo aad u gasho, xogtaada biometric iyo PIN waxay ku sii jiraan qalabkaaga oo waligood nalooma soo diro.
oathauth-2fa-required: Waxaad ka tirsan tahay kooxo u baahan xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
oathauth-2fa-groups-notice-single:
Waxaad ka tirsan tahay {{PLURAL:$1|koox|kooxo}} {{PLURAL:$1|u baahan|u baahan yahay}} xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ($2 ku jira $3). Si aad uga saarto habkan waa inaad:
  • ku darto hab kale oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah, ama
  • naftaada ka saarto {{PLURAL:$1|kooxda|kooxaha}}. Fadlan booqo: $4
oathauth-2fa-groups-notice-multiple:
Waxaad ka tirsan tahay {{PLURAL:$1|koox|kooxo}} {{PLURAL:$1|u baahan|u baahan yahay}} xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo. Si aad uga saarto habkan waa inaad:
  • ku darto hab kale oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah, ama
  • naftaada ka saarto {{PLURAL:$1|kooxda|kooxaha}}.
oathauth-2fa-groups-notice-multiple-link: Si aad uga baxdo {{PLURAL:$1|kooxda|kooxo}} fadlan booqo:
oathauth-remove-lastkey-required: Ma saari kartid habkaaga ugu dambeeya ee xaqiijinta haddii aad ka tirsan tahay kooxo u baahan xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo. Fadlan ku dar hab kale oo xaqiijin ah ka hor intaadan kan ka saarin.
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-cond-oa: Isticmaaluhu waxa uu haystaa xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa
